groups.theme: Users who are cost-conscious and rating only on Medito's free access, optional donations and ad-free experience.
example_reviews: not free despite what "Mike" mentioned from a previous response. I would like to try it first but no thank you.
As a former user of Headspace, I can say that I truly enjoy using this beautiful and well-designed meditation app. It's also genuinely free and I'm never bombarded with ads!

groups.theme: Users using Medito for sleep, bedtime, and uninterrupted calming audio
example_reviews: An absolutely amazing app that's helped me a lot with my sleep pattern. The only thing I would add if I could is a feature to make a queue of multiple different meditations.
Can't get to sleep without it now.

groups.theme: Users seeking benefits from Medito to be relieved from anxiety, stress, depression, grief, or panic
example_reviews: I have been using the app for almost 4 years. I use it mainly in case of a crisis situation and to control my emotions. This app helped me to deal with panic attacks more easily and even reduce them.
i love this app so much it has helped me a lot with anxiety and stress

groups.theme: User experience from using the app as well as giving users a sense of progress and accomplishment through courses, streaks, and reminders to build a meditation habit
example_reviews: Easy to start. Beginners course was very helpful for someone who has never meditated before.
a good app to make a habit of meditation

groups.theme: Users who experience app issues such as crashes, audio problems and loss of progress
example_reviews: I love medito, however recently I've had the problem where whenever I try to play a meditation, the app crashes on me.
how to get at 5 Stars except that I had to change devices and I lost track of my progress which is disappointing so no five stars
